name: Celco Community
description_short: Celco Community Credit Union is a Virginia-based credit union serving Giles County and surrounding areas, offering auto loans, personal loans, HELOCs, and traditional banking services.
description_long: Celco Community Credit Union was established on August 28, 1956, as Celco Employees Federal Credit Union at the Celanese plant in Narrows, Virginia. The organization relocated to its current building in 1985 and expanded membership beyond employees to serve the broader Giles County community. In July 2014, a second branch opened in Pembroke, Virginia, and in September 2024, the credit union expanded its field of membership to include several surrounding counties and cities. The credit union's founding mission remains centered on encouraging thrift among members through payroll-deduction savings, low-interest loan rates, and comprehensive financial services. Celco Community Credit Union offers a range of consumer lending products including auto loans (as low as 4.24% APR for new vehicles), signature loans (10.50% APR), home equity lines of credit (7.25% APR), and specialized loans for ATVs/motorcycles (5.25% APR) and campers/RVs (3.74% APR). Members have access to online banking through the Virtual Branch platform, mobile payment services via MessagePay for loan and credit card payments, and debit/credit card products. The credit union operates two physical branch locations with combined ATM access and participates in shared branching with thousands of credit unions nationwide, providing members with expanded transaction capabilities. Celco Community Credit Union distinguishes itself through its regional focus and long operational history in southwestern Virginia. The organization maintains relatively competitive interest rates for various loan products and offers accessibility features on its website, including AudioEye optimization. The credit union provides department-specific contact lines for teller services, loan department, accounting, and collections, indicating organized internal operations. Membership eligibility is restricted to those living or working in designated areas, creating a community-focused financial institution rather than a nationwide online service. The credit union serves a specific geographic footprint in Virginia with limited national reach. While offering standard credit union services and competitive rates, Celco Community operates with traditional banking hours (Monday-Friday, 8 AM-5 PM) and has only two physical branches. The organization does not appear to offer the comprehensive digital banking features or 24/7 accessibility of larger national institutions. Prospective members should verify eligibility based on residence or employment in covered Virginia counties before applying.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Shared branching access at partner credit unions nationwide
ATM access at four locations across service area
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 3.74% APR for RVs/campers and 4.24% for new vehicles
Two physical branch locations in Narrows and Pembroke with four ATM locations for convenient access
Participation in nationwide shared branching network with thousands of partner credit union locations
MessagePay text-based payment service enabling loan and credit card payments from external accounts
Specialized lending products for niche borrowing needs (ATVs, motorcycles, campers, RVs)
Department-specific phone lines for efficient service routing to loan, teller, and collections departments
Long-established local institution with 68+ years of operating history in the community
cons: Geographic membership restrictions limit eligibility to specific Virginia counties and cities, not nationwide
Only two physical branch locations serving the entire service area, limiting in-person convenience
Limited operating hours (Monday-Friday 8 AM-5 PM, closed weekends) restricts access during non-business hours
No indication of 24/7 customer service or emergency access outside standard business hours
Website content does not mention checking/savings account features or deposit product details
best_for: Virginia residents in Giles County and surrounding areas seeking local relationship-based banking
Auto loan shoppers in the service area comparing rates for vehicle, RV, ATV, or motorcycle purchases
Members prioritizing in-person branch service over fully digital banking
Borrowers eligible for membership seeking competitive fixed-rate personal and home equity loans
diagnosis: Celco Community Credit Union is best for southwestern Virginia residents and employees within its membership field who value local relationship banking and competitive loan rates for vehicles and home equity. The primary caveat is geographic eligibility restrictions—prospective members must live or work in covered Virginia counties, making this institution unsuitable for borrowers outside the service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Virginia-based credit union serving Giles County and surrounding areas, offering auto loans, personal loans, HELOCs, and traditional banking services.
